---
title: "Experiments / Trials"
---

::: {.callout-note}
**What you actually tried, and how you set each attempt up.** This is the
section a reader visits to understand what was tested — not yet what was found.
Delete or repurpose if the project isn't experiment-shaped.
:::

<!--
prompt:
  - What did you try? Number or name each distinct experiment / trial.
  - What was each one designed to find out, and how was success defined?
  - What were the key parameters, configurations, or variations?
  - What's intentionally NOT covered here (and why)?
-->
